evals.query: Open an issue in GitHub with the right labels and link it to the parent issue.
Inspect the latest workflow runs and summarize which job is flaky.
Create the PR from this branch using the project template and do not duplicate an existing one.
Optimize our artifact retention and caching in .github/workflows/ci.yml.
Set up OAuth for our GitHub App integration.
Can you create a Jira ticket and link it to the epic?
Refactor this workflow engine code to be easier to maintain.
Run the linter and fix formatting issues in the repo.
